meta.title: Online Bachelor’s Degree in Journalism & Mass Communication
meta.description: Build your career in media and communication with the BA in Journalism and Mass Communication program. Learn reporting, digital media, and public relations.

@graph.name: BA in Journalism and Mass Communication
@graph.description: Explore the BA in Journalism and Mass Communication program at Teksversity. Learn journalism, digital media, advertising, PR, media laws, and storytelling, and gain practical skills for careers in news, broadcasting, filmmaking, and content creation.

mainEntity.name: What is a BA in Journalism and Mass Communication?

acceptedAnswer.text: BA Journalism and Mass Communication is a 3-year undergraduate program that focuses on media, communication, and storytelling. It covers journalism, digital media, advertising, and public relations, preparing students for careers in news, broadcasting, filmmaking, and content creation.

mainEntity.name: What are the eligibility criteria for BA JMC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students must have completed 10+2 in any stream from a recognized board with a minimum of 45–50% marks. Admissions are based on merit or entrance exams conducted by top universities like DU, Amity, or Christ University.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are taught in BA Journalism and Mass Communication?

acceptedAnswer.text: The BA JMC syllabus includes Print Journalism, Media Laws, Digital Media, Advertising, PR, Radio & TV Production, and Film Studies. Many colleges now integrate AI tools, digital storytelling, and social media strategies to meet 2025–26 media industry trends.

mainEntity.name: What is the scope of BA Journalism and Mass Communication in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: BA JMC offers vast scope in media, advertising, public relations, and digital content creation. With the growing demand in OTT, social media, and online journalism, skilled graduates enjoy strong career opportunities across traditional and digital platforms.

mainEntity.name: What are the best career options after BA JMC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can work as Journalists, Content Creators, PR Executives, Anchors, or Digital Marketers. With experience, they can grow into Media Strategists, Editors, or Communications Managers in media houses, production studios, and corporate firms.

mainEntity.name: What are the higher studies options after BA JMC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students can pursue MA in Journalism, MBA in Media Management, MA in Film Studies, or Postgraduate Diplomas in PR, Digital Marketing, or Broadcast Journalism to enhance their expertise and career scope.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary after BA Journalism and Mass Communication?

acceptedAnswer.text: The average salary for BA JMC graduates in India ranges from ₹3–6 LPA, while experienced professionals in digital media, advertising, or production can earn ₹8–12 LPA, depending on their skills and organization.

mainEntity.name: Which skills help BA JMC students build strong careers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Key skills include writing, communication, video editing, and digital marketing. Mastering tools like Adobe Premiere, Canva, and SEO analytics helps students stand out in today’s digital-first media industry.

mainEntity.name: Is online or distance BA JMC valid in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. UGC-approved universities such as IGNOU, Amity Online, and Chandigarh University offer valid and recognized online and distance BA JMC courses that are accepted for higher education and employment.

mainEntity.name: Is BA Journalism and Mass Communication a good course for the future?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely! With the rapid growth of media, entertainment, and digital platforms, BA JMC remains one of the most promising and future-ready degrees in 2026, offering creative and high-growth careers in journalism, digital media, and communication.

banner.description: The BA in Journalism and Mass Communication (BA JMC) program prepares students to become dynamic media professionals capable of informing, inspiring, and influencing the world.

heading: Why Choose This Program?
benefits: Learn print, digital, and broadcast journalism fundamentals.
Master content creation, editing, and multimedia production.
Develop strong writing, storytelling, and presentation skills.
Gain expertise in public relations, advertising, and media management.
Work on live newsroom and studio-based projects.
Understand media law, ethics, and audience engagement.
Build digital marketing, branding, and content strategy skills.
Collaborate on film, podcast, and social media productions.
Receive 100% placement guidance and industry mentorship.
Prepare for diverse roles in journalism, media, and communication sectors.

reserveYourSpotForm.formDescription: Start your learning journey today. Our experts will reach out to guide you in your next big step!

heading: Overview of
BA in Journalism and Mass Communication Program
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Turn Information into Impact. Tell Stories That Shape the World.

content.value: at Teksversity offers an immersive understanding of media ethics, communication strategies, and storytelling techniques. Through a blend of journalism, film studies, advertising, and digital media, students gain both creative and technical expertise required in today’s fast-evolving media landscape. This BA JMC course focuses on practical exposure from writing news stories and producing digital content to managing social media campaigns and hosting live programs. Students get access to studio-based training, media tools, and industry projects, preparing them for careers as journalists, content creators, anchors, PR professionals, and media strategists.

keyPoints: Develop reporting, writing, and interviewing skills.
Create and edit multimedia stories for diverse platforms.
Understand media law, ethics, and social responsibility.
Build digital media and content marketing proficiency.
Prepare for careers in media, advertising, and communication.

heading: Why Choose BA in Journalism and Mass Communication in
Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: At Teksversity, the BA in Journalism and Mass Communication goes beyond textbooks. The program focuses on hands-on newsroom experience, creative thinking, and storytelling for digital-first audiences. Students work on real-time media assignments, short films, podcasts, and press releases under expert mentorship.

description.firstDescription: The curriculum blends theory with modern media technology equipping learners with skills in scriptwriting, photojournalism, public relations, and digital media production. Alongside academic learning, Teksversity provides career support, internships, and networking with media professionals, ensuring every graduate is job-ready and industry confident.

description.secondDescription: With flexible online learning, state-of-the-art media tools, and live sessions from experienced journalists and producers, Teksversity helps students build successful, impactful careers in the media world.

keyPoints: Reporting, editing, and media production workshops

100% placement assistance and media internships
Resume and portfolio development for journalists

Student-led publication and podcast initiatives

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
